title: The Arithmetic of Self-Replication
description: A modular, source-checked set of physics models of self-replicating space manufacturing: bill-of-materials closure and the electronics wall, solar-limited compute, launch-mass leverage, single-probe operational range, a small deterministic fleet, and a galaxy-filling settlement swarm with light-speed-limited coordination. Every number traces to a citable source or an explicit derivation. This metadata drives the DOI that Zenodo mints on each GitHub release.
